# Copilot Workspace Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements: no language or framework was specified, so this workspace was initialized as a minimal Hello World Python script project.
- [x] Scaffold the Project: created `main.py` as the starter entry point.
- [x] Customize the Project: skipped because this is a Hello World starter.
- [x] Install Required Extensions: `ms-python.python` and `ms-python.vscode-python-envs` were already installed.
- [x] Compile the Project: validated with `python -m py_compile main.py` and workspace diagnostics are clean.
- [x] Create and Run Task: created a VS Code task that runs `main.py` and verified it prints the expected output.
- [x] Launch the Project: not launched automatically; debug instructions are documented in `README.md` and an interactive debug launch can be started on request.
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete: added `README.md` with project, run, and debug guidance.
